firmware.title: X655F-H6211E-Q-AS-200307V149-200522V220_20200525194251
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X655F-H6211E-Q-AS-200522V220
Changed Functions:
1.Updated to the Google Security Patch 20200505.
2.Updated to the Google GMS package 10_202003.
Optimized issues:
1.Optimized the camera effect and performance.
2.Optimized the problem that sometimes cannot receive incoming calls due to network reasons.
3.Optimized UI experience for the Infinity-O Display screen.
4.Optimized some translations of system strings.
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit the XCLUB forum (http://bbs.infinixmobility.com) for more information.
